message_templates: Hey team, does anyone know how to configure {{tool_name}} for the {{service_name}} project? I've been stuck on this for a bit. cc @{{mentioned_user}}
Quick question -- what's the correct endpoint for {{service_name}} in staging? The docs page seems outdated.
Has anyone run into issues with {{tool_name}} after the latest update? My builds keep failing with `{{error_message}}`.
Team announcement: Starting next {{day_of_week}}, we're moving our standup from {{old_time}} to {{new_time}}. Please update your calendars.
Heads up everyone: {{service_name}} will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on {{date}} from {{start_time}} to {{end_time}} UTC. Expect brief downtime.
Exciting news! We just hit {{number}} active users on {{product_name}}. Huge thanks to everyone who contributed to the Q{{quarter}} push.
INCIDENT: {{service_name}} is experiencing elevated error rates. Current error rate: {{number}}%. On-call {{oncall_name}} is investigating. Impact: {{impact_description}}.
Update on the {{service_name}} incident: Root cause identified as {{root_cause}}. Deploying fix now. ETA to resolution: {{number}} minutes.
RESOLVED: {{service_name}} incident is resolved. Total downtime: {{number}} minutes. Post-mortem will be scheduled for {{date}}. Thanks to {{oncall_name}} and {{helper_name}} for the quick response.
PR ready for review: {{pr_title}} ({{pr_url}}). It's a {{change_size}} change touching {{service_name}}. Would appreciate eyes from someone familiar with {{component_name}}.
Can someone take a look at my PR? {{pr_url}} -- It fixes the {{bug_description}} issue we've been seeing in production. Pretty straightforward change.
Need a second review on {{pr_url}} before we can merge. It's blocking the {{feature_name}} release. @{{reviewer_name}} could you take a look when you get a chance?
Deploying {{service_name}} v{{version}} to production. Changes: {{change_summary}}. Rollback plan: revert to v{{previous_version}}.
{{service_name}} v{{version}} is now live in production. Canary looks clean after {{number}} minutes. Monitoring dashboards: {{dashboard_url}}.
FYI: {{service_name}} deploy to staging complete. Running smoke tests now. Will promote to prod after validation. ETA: {{number}} minutes.
Just wrapped up the {{task_name}} spike. TL;DR: we should go with {{recommendation}} because {{reason}}. Full write-up in Confluence: {{confluence_url}}.
Anyone free for a quick pairing session? I'm working on {{task_name}} and could use a second brain on the {{component_name}} logic.
Finally figured out why {{service_name}} was being flaky in tests -- turns out the {{component_name}} mock wasn't resetting state between runs. Fix is up: {{pr_url}}.
Heads up: upgrading the {{cluster_name}} Kubernetes cluster to v{{version}} this weekend. All services should be unaffected but please report any issues in #devops.
New Terraform module for {{resource_type}} is available in the infra repo. Docs: {{docs_url}}. Migrating existing resources is optional but recommended before end of Q{{quarter}}.
PSA: We're hitting {{number}}% of our {{cloud_provider}} quota for {{resource_type}} in the {{region}} region. Please clean up unused resources. I'll be doing an audit next {{day_of_week}}.
Security reminder: Please rotate your API tokens if they were created before {{date}}. Instructions: {{docs_url}}. Deadline: end of this {{day_of_week}}.
FYI: We've enabled mandatory 2FA for all Acme Corp GitHub repositories. If you haven't set it up yet, you'll be locked out starting {{date}}. Setup guide: {{docs_url}}.
Completed the dependency audit for {{service_name}}. Found {{number}} vulnerabilities ({{critical_count}} critical). PRs are up to bump the affected packages. Please review and merge ASAP.
Anyone want to grab lunch at {{restaurant_name}} today? Thinking around {{time}}.
TIL that {{tool_name}} has a {{feature_name}} feature. Would have saved me hours last sprint if I'd known.
The new {{product_name}} release blog post is live: {{blog_url}}. Nice work to everyone who contributed, especially the {{department}} team.
Welcome @{{new_hire_name}}! They're joining the {{department}} team starting today. Please say hi and help them feel at home!
@{{new_hire_name}} for your dev setup, follow the guide here: {{docs_url}}. If you hit any snags, ping me or @{{buddy_name}} and we'll sort it out.
Pro tip for new folks: bookmark the {{department}} Confluence space ({{confluence_url}}) -- it has pretty much everything you'll need in your first month.
Sprint {{sprint_number}} update: {{completed_count}}/{{total_count}} stories completed. Velocity: {{velocity}} points. Blockers: {{blocker_list}}. Retro on {{date}}.
Reminder: Sprint {{sprint_number}} ends {{day_of_week}}. Please update your Jira tickets and log any remaining hours. Demo at {{time}} on {{date}}.
Sprint planning for Sprint {{sprint_number}} is tomorrow at {{time}}. Please groom your backlog items beforehand. Focus areas: {{focus_areas}}.
We're seeing {{symptom}} on {{service_name}}. Checking if it's related to the {{cloud_provider}} incident reported on their status page. Will update in {{number}} minutes.
Customer-facing impact confirmed. {{number}} support tickets filed in the last {{number}} minutes about {{symptom}}. Customer Success is sending a status update to affected accounts.
All clear. The {{service_name}} issue was caused by {{root_cause}}. We've applied a hotfix and are monitoring. Full post-mortem doc will be shared in #incidents by EOD {{day_of_week}}.
Just published a blog post internally about {{topic}}: {{url}}. Covers the lessons we learned during the {{project_name}} migration. Feedback welcome!
Reminder: {{presenter_name}} is doing a tech talk on {{topic}} this {{day_of_week}} at {{time}} in {{room_name}} (also on Zoom). Highly recommend if you work on {{service_name}}.
Shared a new Runbook for handling {{scenario}} on {{service_name}}: {{confluence_url}}. On-call engineers, please review before your next rotation.
Thinking about adding {{feature_name}} to {{product_name}}. Main concern is the impact on {{component_name}} latency. Has anyone benchmarked something similar?
The {{feature_name}} RFC is ready for comments: {{docs_url}}. Key open question: should we build this in-house or integrate with {{vendor_name}}? Pros/cons in the doc.
Shipped {{feature_name}} to 10% of users via feature flag. Early metrics look promising: {{metric_name}} up {{number}}%. Will ramp to 50% next week if stable.
Huge shoutout to @{{user_name}} for jumping in on the {{service_name}} incident last night. Quick thinking on the {{solution}} saved us hours of downtime.
Thanks @{{user_name}} for the thorough code review on my PR. The suggestions around {{topic}} were really helpful and I learned a lot.
Kudos to the {{department}} team for shipping {{feature_name}} ahead of schedule. The cross-functional collaboration with {{other_department}} was excellent.
Heads up: we're migrating from {{old_tool}} to {{new_tool}} for {{purpose}}. Migration guide: {{docs_url}}. Deadline to switch: {{date}}.
New internal CLI tool dropped: `acme-{{tool_slug}}`. It automates {{task_description}}. Install via `brew install acme-{{tool_slug}}` or grab it from the releases page: {{url}}.
Updated the CI pipeline to include {{tool_name}} checks. If your builds start failing, it's probably a formatting issue. Run `{{fix_command}}` locally to auto-fix.
